chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Misc. Appln. No.S- 693 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-8803/2020 2. For orders on MA-8804/2020 3. For hearing of main case 11.12.2020. Mr. Nusrat Mehmood Gill, Advocate for the Applicant. ==== 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. It is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant by way of making an application u/s 22-A & B Cr.P.C sought for direction against police to record his FIR against the proposed accused for issuing a cheque dishonestly but learned learned Ist Additional Sessions Judge / Ex-officio Justice of Peace, Tando Adam has dismissed such application vide his order dated 21st October, 2020 such order being illegal is liable to be set-aside with direction to SHO PS Tando Adam City to record statement of the applicant for purpose of FIR. If, for the sake of argument it is believed that a cognizable offence is made out, then the applicant could prove the same adequately by having a recourse u/s 200 Cr.P.C without involvement of the police. No illegality is pointed out which may justify making interference with the impugned order, by this Court, in exercise of its inherent jurisdiction u/s 561-A Cr.P.C. Consequently, the instant Criminal Misc. Application is dismissed in limine. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa
